div.style: display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-start; gap: 24px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;
div.div: Getting Started with Astro: A Modern Static Site Generator

div.style: color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2em; margin-bottom: 16px;
